title: tillaea brevifolia
intro: Tillaea brevifolia, also known as New Zealand pineapple weed or mountain tillaea, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its essential oil content. The health benefits of Tillaea brevifolia include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and promoting digestion, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health issues. Tillaea brevifolia is typically prepared as a tea or infused oil, and it can also be used as a topical application for skin issues and injuries.
